subject: Rogue Thought's Chamber dimensions
fact: Three tall decorative brain jars stand at the center of the large room.
source_quote: Three tall decorative brain jars stand at the center

subject: Opals count and value
fact: Two gemstones worth 25 gold pieces each were discovered among the treasures in the lair.
source_quote: Two gemstones worth 25 gold pieces each

subject: Circlet value
fact: An ornate headpiece worth 250 gold pieces was discovered by the party while searching the lair.
source_quote: An ornate headpiece worth 250 gold pieces

subject: Chainmail Pouch contents
fact: A small pouch containing 35 gold pieces was found among the loot in the lair.

subject: Rare Wine count
fact: Three bottles of exquisite and rare wine were brought by Isthana as a gift.
source_quote: Three bottles of exquisite and rare wine

subject: Wand upgrade sequence
fact: The Wand of the War Mage +2 is an upgrade from a previous wand of the war mage +1.
source_quote: upgrading his previous wand of the war mage +1

subject: Spirit Guardians casting count
fact: Spirit Guardians were cast by Bramgrim multiple times throughout the session.
